arts.ttl: Preview: Dundee United vs. Aberdeen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Scottish Premiership clash between Dundee United and Aberdeen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Fifth hosts fourth in the Scottish Premiership table, as Dundee United and Aberdeen go toe-to-toe at Tannadice and both looking to finalise their 2024/25 Scottish Premiership positions. Defeat for Du...
